dataset.name: Insur
dataset.description: Records for carrier/broker/freight forwarder active or pending individual insurance policies. Linked to entities by docket number. Contains insurance company name, policy number, type of insurance, coverage amounts, and effective dates. Entities can hold multiple policies, resulting in multiple records per entity.
dataset.update_frequency: Daily by 9:30 AM US Eastern Time
dataset.scope: Includes insurance policy records that have been updated or added since the previous dataset run. Policy removals appear as blank records (all fields empty or '00000' except Docket Number).

naming_convention.daily_difference: [Dataset Name] — contains only recently changed/added records. Removals shown as blank records.
naming_convention.full_baseline: [Dataset Name] – All With History — contains all active/pending insurance policy records as of the latest update.

special_notes: The Daily Difference variant represents insurance policy removals as blank records — only the Docket Number is populated; all other fields will be empty or show '00000' values.
Entities can hold multiple insurance policies, so expect multiple records per Docket Number.
For Insurance Type 1 (BI&PD), amounts are in fields #4 and #5. For Insurance Types 2, 3, and 4 (Cargo, Bond, Trust Fund), fields #4 and #5 will show 0 since they are not BI&PD policies.

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.description: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers

fields.name: Insurance Type
fields.description: Type of insurance policy on file
fields.notes: Only Insurance Type 1 (BI&PD) will have non-zero values in fields #4 and #5. Types 2, 3, and 4 will show 0 in those fields.

fields.name: BI&PD Class
fields.description: Classification of the BI&PD insurance policy

fields.name: BI&PD Maximum Dollar Limit
fields.description: Maximum dollar amount the insurance company is liable for, in thousands. Only populated for Insurance Type 1 (BI&PD).

fields.name: BI&PD Underlying Dollar Limit
fields.description: Underlying dollar limit for the BI&PD policy, in thousands. Only populated for Insurance Type 1 (BI&PD).

fields.name: Policy Number
fields.description: Insurance policy specific identifier assigned by the insurance company

fields.name: Effective Date
fields.description: Effective date of the insurance policy

fields.name: Form Code
fields.description: FMCSA form code identifying the type of insurance filing

fields.name: Insurance Company Name
fields.description: Name of the insurance company for the policy. Note: the policy may be administered by a company branch with a different name.

record_relationships.cardinality: One-to-many (one entity can have multiple insurance policies)

related_datasets.name: Carrier
related_datasets.relationship: Carrier dataset has summary insurance flags (BIPD on File, Cargo on File, Bond/Surety on File) that reflect the aggregate of individual policies in this dataset.

related_datasets.name: ActPendInsur
related_datasets.relationship: Provides additional date details (posted date, cancel effective date) for active/pending policies.

related_datasets.name: InsHist
related_datasets.relationship: Contains historical/cancelled insurance policies that are no longer active.

related_datasets.name: Rejected
related_datasets.relationship: Contains insurance filings that FMCSA rejected.

disclaimer: Data is provided as a public service by FMCSA for informational purposes only. It is a point-in-time snapshot and does not constitute legal advice or a legal contract.
